overview.Name: Allbirds Inc
overview.Description: Allbirds Inc (BIRD) stands at the forefront of the sustainable footwear and apparel industry, renowned for its innovative use of natural materials such as merino wool and eucalyptus fibers since its establishment in 2016. The company is committed to achieving a carbon-neutral supply chain, reflecting its dedication to environmental stewardship and responsible fashion practices. By engaging eco-conscious consumers and setting high standards for sustainability and transparency, Allbirds is well-positioned to capitalize on the expanding market for sustainable goods, driving long-term growth and establishing itself as a leader in the fashion industry.
overview.Address: 30 HOTALING PLACE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, UNITED STATES, 94111
